title: 10 best herbal tinctures for periodontal disease
description: Peppermint tinctures helps with periodontal disease because of its natural antibacterial properties, which effectively combat the bacteria that cause gum inflammation and infection. The menthol content in peppermint also has analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, reducing pain and swelling associated with periodontitis. Additionally, peppermint's antiseptic properties help to reduce plaque buildup on teeth and gums, promoting healthy oral tissues and preventing further deterioration ...
